summary: Reduced the DinoBrain completion gate from three live pre-response related failures to one by adding a completed MCP fallback preflight proof for the stale current Codex thread. The only remaining verify:goal blocker is fresh Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit live proof.
decisions: Do not mark the active goal complete because real Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit live evidence is still missing.
MCP fallback proof is useful for stale-thread fail-closed evidence but is not a substitute for live Desktop hook proof.
Computer Use cannot automate Codex Desktop UI under its safety rules, so the remaining proof must be produced by a fresh trusted Codex Desktop workspace prompt.
next_steps: Run npm run codex:live-proof or scripts/start-codex-live-proof.ps1, paste the copied proof prompt into a fresh Codex Desktop workspace thread, then rerun verify:goal.
After live proof passes, refresh status artifacts and commit/push the final data evidence.
